textByHash.00f3d8a1305788dfa706141b086e7e35d0d6a86b: My Granny can move faster than you.
textByHash.047b60c43163127b0222d11d7e1ab48c762ade7f: This is training soldier. If you want fun go make some cocktails.
textByHash.4abf8d6139f2273a6fc3426a011aa10624f27eb7: I'm amazed by how much humans chat. The sign over there says training area, not pointless conversation area.
textByHash.4d574d1d309587232ea3e57eb08a3dcef3edb7a8: Okay get over that log, quick quick!
textByHash.63e33dfdfab0ec98193f87a699193f41b9e3a197: You're not done yet! Do this for me!
textByHash.682c79b7278b7b2ee962372e45a4e1c419021605: My baby sister can do puzzles better than that!
textByHash.744c6644d59f49a1ee4663801406046f8639316b: If you complete the course in order from the slippery log to the end, your agility will increase much faster than by repeating just one obstacle.
textByHash.86727f4b660c50c7c4dd619f32692b3b7c21c108: Come on scaredy cat, get across that rope!
textByHash.d86188b9fc55c5b6c8ae894b998022367ca5c18a: This isn't a grannies' tea party, let's see some sweat human. Go! Go! Go!
textByHash.e317bf706865fff8d7532d357bde32d7cf9d57a6: This, my friend, is where we train. Here we improve our agility. It's an essential skill.
textByHash.fd48fa28285d8d511a3ff4038338f11001638177: Move it, move it, move it!
